_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section.
_comment_script: kind:script 'command' contains exactly ONE scripts/* path token.
_comment_manual: kind:manual entries include a non-empty 'steps' array.

AC-002-a.verifier: manual live app check of toolbar toggle
steps: Run the Toaster dev app with `bun run tauri dev`.
Load any video fixture (e.g. eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4) into the editor.
Confirm the new 'Also save .ass subtitle sidecar' button appears adjacent to the 'Burn captions into video' toggle in the editor toolbar.
Click the new toggle so it shows the accent (on) styling.
Quit and relaunch the app. Re-load the same fixture.
Confirm the toggle is still on (state persisted via AppSettings.export_ass_sidecar_enabled).
With burn and sidecar both enabled, export eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4 to a temp directory.
Before the FFmpeg spawn, Toaster writes <output>.burn_captions.ass (burn temp) and <output>.ass (sidecar).
Run `fc /B <output>.burn_captions.ass <output>.ass` (Windows) or `cmp` (POSIX) and confirm zero byte differences.
Record the fixture id, both file SHA-256 hashes, and the toaster build SHA in the feature journal.
With burn OFF and sidecar OFF, export eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4 to an empty temp directory.
List the directory; confirm only the output media file exists.
Confirm no *.ass and no *.burn_captions.ass files remain.
With burn ON and sidecar ON, export eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4 to a temp directory.
Play the output video and confirm captions are burned in.
Open <basename>.ass in a text editor and confirm it contains [Script Info], [V4+ Styles], and [Events] with Dialogue: lines.
Confirm byte-identity with the burn temp per AC-003-b.
With burn OFF and sidecar ON, export eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4 to a temp directory.
Play the output video and confirm NO burned captions.
Confirm <basename>.ass exists and parses as valid ASS in Aegisub (or at minimum opens in a text editor).
Inspect the logged FFmpeg command line from Toaster and confirm no subtitles= filter is present.
Set export_format to an audio-only preset (e.g. mp3 or m4a) via the Settings panel or settings.json.
With sidecar ON, export eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4 to a temp directory.
Confirm the output audio file is produced and NO <basename>.ass file is written (audio-only gate).
